rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Nonstatutory Motion To Dismiss (Re Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 23, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR, SHREE JALARAM HOTEL LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Nonstatutory Motion To Dismiss (Re Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint) continued to March 28, 2018. Parties to provide supplemental briefs including authority to address the following issues raised in opposition: Plaintiffs are suing for the right to return to the Bristol Hotel (Opposition 23:23-24). Plaintiffs are not splitting a cause of action because Bristol 4 brought a specific performance claim (equity) and the present case is for international tort of fraud. (Opposition 16: 24-28). Specifically, the supplemental brief shall cite authorities in support of (in opposition to) Plaintiffs' argument)that bar on issue splitting regarding "the right to return" is not applicable because the earlier action was for equitable relief based on breach of contract theory while the later action sounds in fraud. Supplemental briefs not to exceed 3 pages and to be filed no later than March 27, 2018 by 8:00 a.m. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than 8:30 a.m. on March 27, 2018. = (501/REQ)
